name: video-template-beat-synced-outfit-transformation-dance
title: Beat-Synced Outfit Transformation Dance
description: A prompt for Seedance 2.0 that coordinates a character dance following breakdown frames while performing a beat-synced outfit change.

query.en: Have the character from Image 1 perform the dance based on the breakdown in Image 3. During the performance, include a beat-synced transformation into the character from Image 2. After the transformation, the character from Image 2 continues and completes the remaining dance steps from Image 3. Emphasize precise beat matching with the music
query.zh-CN: 使用这个插件完成以下任务：Have the character from Image 1 perform the dance based on the breakdown in Image 3. During the performance, include a beat-synced transformation into the character from Image 2. After the transformation, the character from Image 2 continues and completes the remaining dance steps from Image 3. Emphasize precise beat matching with the music
